news.paragraph: Financial stocks are experiencing mixed momentum, falling in pre-market trading on Wednesday after finishing higher the previous afternoon. Market participants are weighing these movements alongside mixed equity futures ahead of an upcoming US-China meeting. No specific earnings or regulatory catalysts are identified in the current news cycle.
